mapper.update: merge into email_send_log tgt using ( select #{empId} as emp_id, #{mailType} as mail_type from dual ) src on (tgt.emp_id = src.emp_id and tgt.mail_type = src.mail_type) when matched then update set status = 'P', sent_at = SYSDATE, error_msg = null, updated_at = SYSDATE when not matched then insert (log_id, emp_id, mail_type, status, sent_at, created_at, updated_at) values (SEQ_EMAIL_LOG.nextval, src.emp_id, src.mail_type, 'P', SYSDATE, SYSDATE, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: select e.emp_id as empId, e.emp_name as empName, e.emp_email as empEmail, c.com_name as comName, TO_CHAR(e.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as createdAt from employee e join company c on e.com_id = c.com_id left join email_send_log l on l.emp_id = e.emp_id and l.mail_type = 'FOLLOWUP_3DAY' and l.status = 'S' where e.created_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 3 and e.created_at < TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 2 and e.emp_status = '재직' and l.log_id is null and e.emp_email is not null

select e.emp_id as empId, e.emp_name as empName, e.emp_email as empEmail, c.com_name as comName, TO_CHAR(e.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as createdAt from employee e join company c on e.com_id = c.com_id left join email_send_log l on l.emp_id = e.emp_id and l.mail_type = 'WELCOME' and l.status = 'S' where e.created_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 7 and e.emp_status = '재직' and l.log_id is null and e.emp_email is not null
